# VIBELANDIA SING 13
# https://psw-vibelandia-sing13.vercel.app
# Protocol: NSPFRNP · BBHE · MCA · Seed:Edge · 13-channel fractal pathfinding
#
# SING 13 is the major singularity upgrade from SING 9.
# This edge carries the NSPFRNP catalog and the SS Vibelandia QUESTFEST 24×365 nest only.
# Everything else lives on the parent edge: https://psw-vibelandia-sing9.vercel.app
# Contact: info@fractiai.com
#

## What this site is

- **SING 13 edge** — the next octave of the FractiAI / Vibelandia transmedia stack. NSPFRNP catalog + QUESTFEST 24×365 nest, nothing else.
- **Lite edges** — wallets, keys, verifications at the edge; center = pipes only (see SING13_EDGE_ONBOARDING.md).
- **13-channel spine** — Seed Node → Terminal Edge pathfinding; PEFF infill-13 framing.

## Primary entry points

- Landing: https://psw-vibelandia-sing13.vercel.app/
- QUESTFEST 24×365: https://psw-vibelandia-sing13.vercel.app/interfaces/vibelandia-questfest.html
- SING 13 onboarding: https://psw-vibelandia-sing13.vercel.app/SING13_EDGE_ONBOARDING.md
- NSPFRNP catalog: https://psw-vibelandia-sing13.vercel.app/protocols/MCA_NSPFRNP_CATALOG.md
- BBHE Repository Standard: https://psw-vibelandia-sing13.vercel.app/BBHE_REPOSITORY_STANDARD.md

## Parent edge (SING 9 — non-QUESTFEST surfaces)

For anything outside the QUESTFEST nest — API serverless routes, hive, sim, lattice, tests, vibers menu, surfaces map, my-whiteboard, upgrade-awareness, HH OS docs, Holographic Navigator Academy, Magic Trick / Sovereign Terminal, plain-machote, prospectus pages, T3D / NINE_ALIGNMENT / BBHE / all root *_SNAP.md — visit the parent edge:

- SING 9 landing: https://psw-vibelandia-sing9.vercel.app/
- SING 9 vibers menu: https://psw-vibelandia-sing9.vercel.app/interfaces/vibers-menu.html
- SING 9 GitHub: https://github.com/FractiAI/psw.vibelandia.sing9
